name: Arrow-Catching Shield
description: You gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class against ranged attack rolls while you wield this Shield. This bonus is in addition to the Shield's normal bonus to AC. Whenever an attacker makes a ranged attack roll against a target within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to become the target of the attack instead.

effect.total_ac_vs_ranged: +4 against ranged attacks with this shield

special_ability.name: Ranged Attack Interception
special_ability.trigger: Attacker makes ranged attack against target within 5 feet
special_ability.effect: You become the target of the attack instead

attunement.description: You must attune to this shield by holding it for 1 hour.

reactive.description: Intercept ranged attacks against nearby allies

tactical_uses: Protect allies standing next to you
Use in formation with melee combatants
notes: This shield excels at protecting nearby allies from ranged attacks by allowing you to intercept them as a reaction.
